sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59418" key="kotulw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοτυλ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n59418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κοτύλη, ἀγγεῖον</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0008.tlg001.perseus-grc1:480b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">480b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
